name: Strategic Education, Inc.
business: Strategic Education, Inc. is an education services company that provides access to high-quality education through campus-based and online post-secondary education offerings, as well as through programs to develop job-ready skills for high-demand markets. The company operates primarily through its wholly-owned subsidiaries, Capella University and Strayer University in the United States, and Torrens University in Australia, along with an Education Technology Services segment that develops employer education benefits programs.
sellsTo: domestic students in US and Australia

exposures.sentence: Strategic Education, Inc. is an education services company that provides access to high-quality education through campus-based and online post-secondary education offerings, as well as through programs to develop job-ready skills for high-demand markets.

catalysts.event: OBBBA eliminates Federal Direct PLUS loans for graduate and professional students
catalysts.sentence: OBBBA eliminates, effective July 2026, Federal Direct PLUS loans for graduate and professional students, with some limited grandfathering for current graduate and professional student borrowers.

catalysts.event: Department of Education publishes final rules for OBBBA and gainful employment
catalysts.sentence: The Department intends to publish final rules effective July 2026 (for OBBBA-related provisions) and July 2027 (for gainful employment-related provisions).

catalysts.event: Gainful employment rule warning requirement begins for failing programs
catalysts.sentence: Starting July 1, 2026, programs failing either metric in a single year must issue warnings to current and prospective students, detailing the failure and potential loss of Title IV eligibility.
